subcodes.first_line: O My kind friends! In the absence of Jinab-i-Rahmatullah, in truth ye must exert the utmost effort [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان من در غیبت جناب آقا رحمت الله فی الحقیقه نهایت همت مجری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
